reforms.description: A loan guarantee scheme available to all firms has been boosted in 2009-10, aimed at enhancing financial options for small and medium-sized companies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing financial options for small and medium-sized companies supports their growth and innovation potential.
reforms.status_evidence: The scheme has been actively in place since its boost in 2009-10.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly boosts financial options for SMEs, which is crucial for their development.
reforms.source_quote: A loan guarantee scheme available to all firms has been boosted in 2009-10.

reforms.description: The Danish Foundation for Entrepreneurship was established in 2010 to create a coherent national commitment to education and training in entrepreneurship.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Creating a national commitment to entrepreneurship education enhances the skills and capabilities of future innovators.
reforms.status_evidence: The foundation was established and is operational since 2010.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a foundation signifies a significant step towards enhancing entrepreneurship education.
reforms.source_quote: The Danish Foundation for Entrepreneurship was established in 2010 as part of the Strategy for Education and Training in Entrepreneurship.

reforms.description: The Danish government has increased its spending on energy research to support the market maturation of existing technologies and the development of new technologies through the Energy Technology Development and Demonstration Programme.
reforms.component_name: Energy Technology Development and Demonstration Programme
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased spending on energy research fosters innovation and technological advancement in the energy sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has actively increased spending on energy research.
reforms.importance_rationale: The increase in funding represents a significant commitment to advancing energy technologies.
reforms.source_quote: The Danish government has spent more and more on energy research in recent years.

reforms.description: Denmark has implemented a feed-in tariff system to support electricity from renewable sources, providing larger subsidies for wind technologies compared to other renewables.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The feed-in tariff system incentivizes investment in renewable energy, promoting innovation and technology adoption in the sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The feed-in tariff system is currently in operation.
reforms.importance_rationale: The implementation of a feed-in tariff system represents a significant policy shift towards supporting renewable energy.
reforms.source_quote: A feed-in tariff system is also in place, and it is the main policy to support electricity from renewables.
